data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 7b17b3e038c0 is on main. meetsLeaderboardThresholds (lease-audit-helpers.ts:213-221) enforces total>=10 AND rate>25%. buildLeaderboard filters all input to qualifiedStats before ranking, computing mean/margin/totalN — excluded agents cannot influence any displayed metric. Steps with no qualified agents are omitted entirely. All 56 tests pass (including threshold edge cases), tsc and eslint clean. No invariants defined; no regressions detected.
